codeReview.summary: This feature intentionally made no source edits, so there is no worker commit diff to review. The review therefore focused on handoff evidence quality versus the feature contract; the submitted run is still partial and does not satisfy the per-assertion evidence requirement.

issues.description: The feature contract requires one interactiveChecks pass/fail record per fulfilled assertion (`features.json:207`), but this handoff provides grouped checks and explicitly calls out partial evidence (`successState: partial` at line 6; partial-evidence notes at lines 11, 78, 94, and 118). As written, coverage for all fulfilled VAL-* assertions cannot be verified from this feature handoff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker success contract conflicts with validation-only features that explicitly forbid source edits.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill hard-requires a commit for success (`.factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md:55-63`), while this feature requires no source changes (`features.json:209`) and the handoff reports no commit because of that conflict (handoff lines 11, 129-132).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission state shows a completed feature whose latest worker handoff is still partial, which makes completion semantics ambiguous for downstream reviewers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature is marked `status: completed` in `features.json:317`, but the reviewed handoff is `successState: partial` with `returnToOrchestrator: true` (handoff lines 6-7).

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is no shared assertion-report template for high-cardinality UI sweeps, which contributed to grouped evidence instead of one record per VAL assertion.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff deviation notes grouped interactive checks instead of per-assertion entries (handoff lines 134-136) and explicitly requests a dedicated validation-report schema (handoff lines 140-141).

summary: Failing review: no code changes were expected, but the submitted handoff remains partial and does not meet the feature’s required per-assertion interactive evidence contract.
